The Video Recording of the Online Seminar Held with the Participation of Students and Parents is Released!

In this event, which aims to provide important information to students who aim for superior success in education and to the parents who support them, topics such as the advantages of high school summer school programs for students, the development of research skills, ways to achieve superior success and the importance of happiness in the education process were discussed by Prof. Dr. Nihat Berker.
